query: SELECT rt.id, rt.code, rt.name, rt.categoryId, rc.name as categoryName, rt.isActive FROM requestTypes rt LEFT JOIN requestCategories rc ON rt.categoryId = rc.id ORDER BY rt.displayOrder;
